chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.3611 of 2025 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ For hg of bail appln 16.01.2026. Mr. Muhammad Daud Narejo, advocate for applicant. Mr. Qamaruddin Nohri, Deputy Prosecutor General. After arguing the case at some length, learned defence counsel does not press this bail application and seeks directions to the trial court to expedite the trial, which has not been opposed by learned D.P.G. In view of above, this bail application is dismissed as not pressed. The trial court is, however, directed to expedite the trial, examine material witnesses and conclude it within four months without fail, after which in any case, the applicant would be at liberty to repeat her bail application, which will be decided on its own merits. The Cr. Bail Application stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
